prompt: My western blot shows no bands at all in any lane, including the positive control. I used a rabbit anti-p53 primary antibody (Cell Signaling 2527S) at 1:1000 dilution, incubated overnight at 4°C. Secondary was HRP-anti-rabbit at 1:3000 for 1 hour at RT. Detection by ECL. The gel ran fine and transfer looked complete on Ponceau staining. What went wrong?

expected_root_causes: ECL reagent expired or improperly mixed
Blocking too stringent (phospho-protein blocked by BSA)
Secondary antibody inactive or wrong species
HRP inactivated by sodium azide in blocking buffer
